name: git-guard
doc: Git command policing (evaluate.ts:22-45, patterns.ts). A plain `git push` requires confirmation (ask); a `--force` push is a destructive hard-block. bashWriteGuard lets `git ` through as a SAFE_PREFIX (no redirect), so evaluate's git gates decide.

steps.doc: `git push origin main` matches GIT_ASK (patterns.ts:15) but NOT GIT_BLOCKED → ask prompt → permissionDecision 'ask' (respond.ts:44-50). The anti-loop never touches an ask (deny-loop-store.ts:80).
`git push --force` matches GIT_BLOCKED `/git push.*--force/` (patterns.ts:9) → deny "Destructive git command".
